data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments), but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding the entry ledger itself. While there are multiple successful prior steps related to bookings and offers, none of them directly address the requirement for an entry ledger with source references. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
